scene.description: SELF-REFERENCE LOOP DETECTED. The file opens into a room that is your room, repeated. In each copy, someone is already working.

fragments.label: A Keeper at the Desk
fragments.text: A Keeper at this desk. The badge is yours. The face is not — quite.

fragments.label: The One Who Chose Differently
fragments.text: A version of you who chose differently on the lighthouse. They are still here. Still deciding.

fragments.label: Your Origin Record
fragments.symbol: Where your origin record should be: a field that reads SELF, defined as SELF, defined as SELF.

fragments.label: The Count of Versions
fragments.text: You try to count the versions. The count changes while you hold it.

interpretations.label: Insist you are the single, original Keeper
Accept you are one iteration among many
